skills.name: skill-core
skills.description: Skill Protocol v2 compiler and meta-skill for building Agent Skills at scale.

skills.name: literature-survey
skills.description: Conduct traceable, standards-aligned literature investigation: structured research question, reproducible search, screening log, verified paper notes.

skills.name: paper-quality-gate
skills.description: Audit review artifacts for credibility before delivery: citation integrity, verification rates, synthesis quality, methodology transparency.

skills.name: research-survey
skills.description: Orchestrate credible research surveys: literature-survey → review-synthesis → paper-quality-gate with adjustable parameters.

skills.name: review-synthesis
skills.description: Produce narrative review and structured evidence from verified literature artifacts: thematic synthesis, consensus/debate, gaps.
